name: Antlion
description: The main threat of the Sandbox and one of the toughest late-midgame encounters. There are roaming and pit antlions, and both punish sloppy fighting brutally under the sun.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. Pit variants take 2 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Roamer - Bite: 100
Roamer - Charged Bite: 140
Roamer - Burrow: 125
Pit - Ant Throw: 120
Pit - Sand Fling: 75
Pit - Bite: 100
Pit - Charged Bite: 140
Pit - Pit Thrash: 60

specialTraits: Pit variants can slow and drag targets deeper with sand. Looting a pit antlion collapses the pit and opens the tunnel entrance it was guarding. Both variants also lightly resist gas hazard.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It snaps forward with a direct bite once it gets into range.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it whenever possible; the damage is high even on the roamer.
attacks.notes: The baseline attack shared by both variants.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It coils up before a deeper, harder lunge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep it and do not simply backpedal across the sand.
attacks.notes: The strongest direct strike for both variants.

attacks.name: Burrow Ambush
attacks.tell: The roaming variant burrows down and bursts back up under the player's position.
attacks.howToAvoid: The moment it burrows, sprint away; standing still almost always means eating the pop-up.
attacks.notes: The roaming version uses this to reposition and punish bad kiting.

attacks.name: Ant Throw
attacks.tell: If you stand near the pit rim, it throws a dead black worker ant at you.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or step off the rim before giving it a clean angle.
attacks.notes: Blocking or baiting it does not award black ant parts.

attacks.name: Sand Fling
attacks.tell: From the pit, it spits sand to slow you and drag you deeper.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not fight from the middle of the pit; keep moving or leave entirely.
attacks.notes: Alongside generic damage, it applies a movement-speed slow.

attacks.name: Pit Thrash
attacks.tell: If you stay too close inside the pit, it whips its head violently to sweep the area.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not stand planted near the inner rim. Back off or jump away from the sweep.
attacks.notes: Another part of the pit variant's area-control kit.

behavior: There are two clear variants. The roamer patrols the surface or its tunnels and actively chases prey; the pit variant stays half-buried and tries to pull targets down into range.
interactionWithPlayer: It is extremely aggressive and in the Sandbox it compounds the area's thermal hazard. In pits, the whole fight revolves around not losing your footing or letting the sand drag you downward.
interactionWithCreatures: It also hunts other creatures viciously, especially black worker ants. To an antlion, almost anything crossing the Sandbox is potential prey.
strategy: Salty and slashing are your best answers. Fight at night or near shade so you are not also dealing with Sandbox sizzling. Against roamers, block everything you can; against pits, never give them the center and break their sand control immediately.
